personal.name: Hael Alhsen
personal.title: Senior Mobile Engineer
personal.tagline: iOS & Android Leadership | Enterprise Scale Apps | Agile Delivery
personal.summary: Senior Mobile Engineer with 9+ years of hands-on experience architecting and delivering native iOS, Android and Flutter applications at scale, serving 10M+ users across enterprise, fintech, and IoT-connected platforms. Known for translating complex technical requirements into clean, maintainable systems through deep command of modern architecture patterns including MVVM, MVI, and Repository — paired with a strong foundation in Clean Architecture principles. Brings rare end-to-end ownership across the mobile stack: from crafting custom native SDKs and Method Channel bridges for embedded hardware, to MQTT-driven IoT device integration, to navigating PCI-DSS compliance and enterprise-grade release pipelines across multi-backend environments. Beyond engineering, a natural team builder — having established mobile departments from the ground up, led agile scrum teams, and mentored engineers at all levels. Equally comfortable in the weeds of a technical POC and in the room driving R&D strategy.

highlights: Leading mobile R&D strategy for IoT-connected parking management platform integrating smart locks, IP cameras, LPR systems, and MQTT-enabled sensors, driving delivery across mobile, backend, and ML engineering teams.

Set technical standards, architectural direction, and engineering best practices across the mobile engineering function; coordinating with product, ML, and backend to align delivery against R&D objectives.
Led POC development for YOLO-based ML licence plate recognition and indoor mapping integration; accelerated R&D cycles by 30–40% using AI-augmented development practices.
Consolidated 5+ fragmented app variants into a single modular, feature-toggled platform, cutting code duplication by 60% and reducing new feature development time by 40%.

Established Accumed's mobile engineering department from zero: defined technology stack (Flutter, Clean Architecture, BLoC), designed sprint structure, created code review standards, and implemented CI/CD pipelines (Codemagic) — building the full BOT model for a sustainable mobile team.

Led end-to-end hiring: conducted technical interviews for iOS, Android native, and Flutter developers; onboarded and mentored all new team members on architecture patterns, testing frameworks, and engineering standards.

Owned architectural decision-making and cross-functional alignment: worked directly with product managers, designers, and backend engineers to define API contracts, data models, and system integration strategy for a healthcare appointment platform.

experience.role: Senior Flutter Engineer – White-Label ERP Platform
highlights: Provided senior technical leadership for a white-label multi-tenant ERP platform serving multiple enterprise clients from a single codebase; responsible for architectural consistency, feature-toggle governance, and cross-team alignment across 5 delivered modules.
Implemented enterprise security standards across the platform: OAuth2/JWT authentication, RBAC access control, PCI-DSS-compliant encrypted storage, and offline-first sync with conflict resolution.

Designed modular architecture separating shared core logic from client customisations — enabling rapid deployment of new tenants without codebase duplication, reducing time-to-ship for each new client configuration.

Led technical delivery of two experimental mobile platforms for UNDP humanitarian programme: an Augmented Reality heritage preservation app (ARCore/Android + ARKit/iOS) and a biometrically-secured legal consultation platform with end-to-end encrypted communication.
Developed reusable native Swift and Kotlin SDKs packaged for cross-project deployment; introduced Method Channel architecture enabling modular native capability reuse across future projects.

Led cross-functional mobile team to deliver 5+ production applications for international clients across e-commerce, healthcare, and logistics — from requirements and architecture through App Store and Google Play deployment.

Established CI/CD pipeline using GitHub Actions, reducing release cycle time by 25% through automated build, test, and deployment; drove agile delivery practices, retrospectives, and continuous improvement across the team.

Implemented Clean Architecture across all projects, reducing crash rates by ~15%; led client-facing technical discussions and translating business requirements into scalable mobile architecture decisions.

Developed and maintained native iOS (Swift) and Android (Java) applications for Syria's largest telecommunications provider — architecting secure payment flows and performance-optimised experiences for a 10M+ user base under high-volume, concurrent load.

Remediated security vulnerabilities identified in external penetration tests; implemented iOS Keychain, Android Keystore, ProGuard obfuscation, and mobile security hardening aligned with industry best practices.
Built test automation framework using XCTest (iOS) and Espresso (Android), reducing manual testing time by 30%; collaborated with backend team on Java API development and Oracle database integration.

Engineered automation software interfacing directly with precision measurement instruments via hardware communication protocols — building foundational hardware-software integration expertise that underpins current IoT and connected-device engineering work.

specialisms.title: Mobile Architecture
specialisms.description: Designing scalable, maintainable mobile applications using Clean Architecture, MVVM, MVI, and Repository patterns across Flutter, native iOS (Swift/SwiftUI), and Android (Kotlin/Jetpack Compose). Deep experience building modular, feature-toggled, and white-label multi-tenant platforms serving multiple enterprise clients from a single codebase.

specialisms.title: IoT & Connected Devices
specialisms.description: Bridging mobile with hardware through MQTT, BLE, NFC, and gRPC. Building custom native SDKs and Method Channel bridges to integrate smart locks, IP cameras, LPR systems, and precision measurement instruments — with direct experience on production IoT parking management platforms.

specialisms.title: Native iOS & Android
specialisms.description: Full native mobile development across both platforms: Swift, SwiftUI, UIKit, ARKit, and Combine on iOS; Kotlin, Java, Jetpack Compose, and Dagger on Android. Delivered production apps to 10M+ users at Syriatel, with deep expertise in security hardening, test automation (XCTest, Espresso), and AR experiences (ARKit/ARCore).

specialisms.title: Security & Compliance
specialisms.description: Implementing enterprise-grade mobile security across fintech, healthcare, and ERP platforms: OAuth2/JWT, RBAC, PCI-DSS-compliant encrypted storage, biometric auth, end-to-end encryption, iOS Keychain, Android Keystore, and ProGuard hardening. Remediated vulnerabilities from external penetration tests at Syriatel.

specialisms.title: Cross-Platform with Flutter
specialisms.description: Expert Flutter delivery across e-commerce, healthcare, fintech, and enterprise ERP domains. Deep expertise in BLoC, Clean Architecture, offline-first patterns, and AI-augmented development with GitHub Copilot and Claude Code. Delivered 5+ production apps and white-label platforms used by multiple enterprise tenants.

specialisms.title: AR & ML Integration
specialisms.description: Led POC and delivery of YOLO-based ML licence plate recognition and indoor mapping integration, accelerating R&D cycles by 30–40%. Delivered an ARCore/ARKit augmented reality heritage preservation app for UNDP's humanitarian programme.

specialisms.title: Team Leadership & CI/CD
specialisms.description: Building mobile departments from scratch — defining stacks, designing sprint structures, hiring, onboarding, and establishing code review culture. Setting up automated release pipelines with Codemagic and GitHub Actions, reducing release cycle times by up to 25% and accelerating multi-team delivery at scale.

education.institution: Higher Institute for Applied Sciences and Technology
